title: The Cardboard Lover
writer: Jacques Deval, Lucille Newmark, Carey Wilson
actors: Marion Davies, Jetta Goudal, Nils Asther
plot: A ditzy American girl visiting Monte Carlo is hired by a tennis champ to be his "cardboard lover"--to pretend to be in love with him so he can teach his two-timing fiancée a lesson and win her back. What he doesn't realize is that...
